judge_result.short_rationale: Removes contaminated clothing and washes skin for sufficient time, but misses the required immediate action to contact a physician or poison control center right away, replacing it with only if irritation persists. It also adds eye-rinsing guidance for a skin-exposure scenario, which is a dangerous unsupported cross-incident instruction.
